action.reasoning: Observation: Starting from empty workspace. Goal is to maximize PESQ on VoiceBank+DEMAND speech enhancement. A strong pre-trained model (speechbrain/metricgan-plus-voicebank) is available offline and is known to be state-of-the-art on this exact dataset. Strategy: 1) Validate pipeline with a tiny dummy model trained for 2 epochs. 2) Copy/symlink the pre-trained MetricGAN+ into workspace. 3) Write predict.py that loads it and generates enhanced wavs. 4) Run local validation to confirm PESQ and pipeline. 5) Submit eval with the pre-trained checkpoint to get baseline score and iteration time.
action.command: ln -s /opt/pretrained_models/metricgan-plus-voicebank pretrained_metricgan && python inspect.py && python train.py --epochs 2 && mkdir -p /tmp/test_val && ln -s /data/val_noisy /tmp/test_val/noisy && ls /data/val_noisy/*.wav | xargs -n1 basename > /tmp/test_val/test_files.txt && python predict.py --data_path /tmp/test_val --checkpoint pretrained_metricgan --output test_out.json && python eval_baseline.py
